query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.49 (commit: 1469c486).

## Issue to Resolve

ktlint raise error when there is empty enum class
<!-- The bug you're experiencing might have already be reported!
Please search in the [issues](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues) before creating one. -->

## Expected Behavior
<!---Tell us what should happen. -->
<!-- If relevant, provide a link to the relevant section in the [Kotlin Coding Conventions](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html) or [Android Kotlin Style Guide](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/style-guide).  -->

<!-- Note: Ktlint should not produce any code which conflict with IntelliJ default code formatting. So please verify that your expectation is accepted by IntelliJ default code formatting. -->
When kotlin project has empty enum class, ktlint raise error.

```
$ git clone https://github.com/ganadist/VersionCodeDemo -b ktlint_0471_error
$ cd VersionCodeDemo
$ ./gradlew :ktlint
```

<!---Tell us what happens instead of the expected behavior -->
<!--- Provide the exact command which was executed but please -->
<!--- ensure that the flag "--log-level=debug" is added to the -->

## Steps to Reproduce
<!--- Provide a code example, or an unambiguous set of steps to -->
<!--- reproduce this bug. Minimize the example to the bare -->
<!--- minimum required to reproduce the bug. Small, well written -->
<!--- example are proven to be resolved quicker. -->

* perform ktlint 0.47.1 or master branch with https://github.com/ganadist/VersionCodeDemo/blob/ktlint_0471_error/lib/hostconfig/src/main/java/com/example/myapplication/hostconfig/TestView.kt#L23-L25 code


## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version of ktlint used: 0.47.1 / 0.48.0-SNAPSHOT
* Relevant parts of the `.editorconfig` settings : https://github.com/ganadist/VersionCodeDemo/blob/ktlint_0471_error/.editorconfig  
* Name and version (or code for custom task) of integration used (Gradle plugin, Maven plugin, command line, custom Gradle task): https://github.com/ganadist/VersionCodeDemo/blob/ktlint_0471_error/gradle/ktlint.gradle
* Version of Gradle used (if applicable): 7.5.1
* Operating System and version: ArchLinux / OSX 13.0

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Tnx for reporting. It seems a rare edge case to me. I will skip it for the upcoming release (0.48) and fix it later.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.
